title: rosa × muscosa var. alba
intro: Rosa × muscosa var. alba, also known as the white musk rose, is a variety of the Rosa × muscosa plant, a hybrid of the Rosa gallica and Rosa rubiginosa, characterized by its fragrant, white flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. Rosa × muscosa var. alba has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
